title: PM Lane 172 - Local Exception and Decision Detail Grouping
authority: repo technical authority; PM lane implementation authority; final integration authority
objective: Reduce Project Miner Temp Power exception/decision scan burden by grouping the existing Exception Review and PM Decisions cards without changing warning rendering, decision rendering, exports, storage behavior, or write boundaries.
scope: Grouped the existing Exception Review and PM Decisions cards into Exception Signals and PM Decision Context.
Preserved the same two top-level detail cards, warning severity/code pills, warning messages, decision prompt text, recommended-action text, fallback empty states, and no-write language.
Kept the exception/decision disclosure behavior local and stateless with no exception-review or pm-decision localStorage key.
Used a read-only sidecar to verify the grouping shape while VS Code Codex retained PM implementation and final integration authority.
guardrails: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares product action.
No approval POST or approval-row creation.

No field authorization, assignment, schedule/status, durable field record, production tracking, customer report, completion evidence, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.
No new export action, export handler, filename, payload version, localStorage key, backend route, service/auth/ingress change, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
validation: rg -n "PM Lane 172|Exception and PM decision detail groups|Exception Signals detail group|PM Decision Context detail group|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS - operations-web typecheck passed; operations-web build passed; focused Playwright pm import-intake smoke passed; packet JSON parsed; PM Lane 172 guardrail rg passed; git diff --check passed with only expected CRLF warnings on touched and unrelated markdown files.
sidecar_result: Read-only sidecar Ampere confirmed PM Lane 172 as Local Exception and Decision Detail Grouping, grouping the two existing top-level cards into Exception Signals and PM Decision Context without changing warning/decision data mapping, labels, fallback text, status tone logic, exports, storage, routes, persistence, or authority boundaries.
